fundamentals.long_business_summary: Fractal Industries Limited engages in designing, sourcing, manufacturing, and selling garments. The company offers garments or provides to third party vendor on job work basis, as well as sells finished garments directly to e-commerce platforms. It provides top wear, including shirts, tops, and t-shirts; bottom wear, such as trousers, track pants, shorts, and skirts; ethnic wear comprising kurta sets, kurtas, kurtis, ethnic dresses, and dresses; and outer wear that include shackets, jackets, shrugs, sweatshirts, and woman dungarees. The company also offers end-to-end warehousing and supply chain services; and e-commerce operations including product management system, data analytics, integrated logistics management, order management system, inventory and returns management, order anomaly detection, and multi-channel sales enablement. The company sells its products through e-commerce platforms and other online channels. The company was incorporated in 2020 and is headquartered in Mumbai, India.
